title: Senior React Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced React developer to build modern web applications. Work on real-time user interfaces, optimize performance, and collaborate with design and backend teams.
match_explanation: Excellent match on React, TypeScript, and JavaScript. Strong profile for this role.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build end-to-end web solutions using modern tech stack. You will work on both frontend (React) and backend (Node.js), database design, and DevOps practices.
match_explanation: Good match on Node.js and React. MongoDB and Express experience would be beneficial.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: Develop robust backend APIs using Python and FastAPI. Work with databases, implement authentication, and integrate with machine learning pipelines.
match_explanation: Match on Python and SQL. FastAPI experience would strengthen your application.

title: Frontend Engineer - React
description: Create beautiful and responsive UIs using React and modern CSS frameworks. Collaborate with design teams to implement pixel-perfect designs.
match_explanation: Strong React and JavaScript skills. Tailwind CSS expertise would be ideal.

title: Full Stack JavaScript Developer
description: Work across the full JavaScript stack with Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Build scalable applications and participate in system design decisions.
match_explanation: Excellent JavaScript match. Next.js and AWS experience would be valuable additions.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cloud infrastructure. Work with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS to maintain production systems.
match_explanation: Python and Docker knowledge present. Kubernetes and AWS expertise needed.

title: Senior TypeScript Developer
description: Lead development using TypeScript, build scalable server-side applications with NestJS, and mentor junior developers.
match_explanation: Strong TypeScript foundational skills. NestJS experience would be ideal.

title: Web Developer - React & Node.js
description: Build web applications from scratch using React for frontend and Node.js for backend. Work in an agile environment with frequent deployments.
match_explanation: Good match on React, Node.js, and JavaScript. MongoDB experience helpful.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop and deploy machine learning models using Python. Work with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and integrate models into production systems.
match_explanation: Python skills present. TensorFlow and PyTorch expertise would strengthen candidacy.

title: Frontend Developer - Vue.js
description: Build responsive web applications using Vue.js and Nuxt.js. Focus on creating excellent user experiences and maintaining code quality.
match_explanation: JavaScript foundation exists. Vue.js and Nuxt.js specific experience needed.

title: API Developer - Python & FastAPI
description: Develop RESTful APIs using Python and FastAPI. Handle database design, implement security, and optimize API performance.
match_explanation: Strong Python and SQL skills. FastAPI framework experience would be ideal.

title: MERN Stack Developer
description: Develop full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js (MERN). Participate in architectural decisions and code reviews.
match_explanation: Excellent MERN stack foundation. All core skills present and aligned.

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description: Lead technical initiatives using Node.js and React. Handle database design, system architecture, and mentor team members.
match_explanation: Strong Node.js and React skills. TypeScript and architecture knowledge would be valuable.

title: JavaScript Developer
description: Work on JavaScript-heavy projects using modern frameworks. Build interactive web applications and collaborate with UI/UX designers.
match_explanation: Strong JavaScript foundation and React experience. Great fit for this role.

title: Backend Engineer - Golang
description: Develop high-performance backend services using Go. Work on microservices, APIs, and distributed systems.
match_explanation: SQL and REST API knowledge present. Go language and microservices expertise needed.
